vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for swarm work targeting #1342

plan.title: swarm: add monitoring and takeover support for spawn_subagent agents (slice 3 of #1342)

narratives.Overview: Implement Phase 4 monitoring, checkpoints, and takeover triggers that work with spawn_subagent-dispatched agents using worktree polling and the review-cycle skill tiers.
narratives.ProblemStatement: See GitHub issue #1342 for full context and TDD plan.
narratives.Goals: Implement the assigned slice(s) from the TDD plan in #1342 using the hybrid workaround approach.
narratives.UserStories: As a user of Grok Build, I want the swarm skill to support non-Warp environments natively.

items.title: Define monitoring approach for grok-build platform (worktree + sub-agent messaging)
